user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: Company Name
columns.description: Official name of the AI company or organization

columns.name: Website
columns.description: Official company website URL where company information and careers page can be accessed

columns.name: Is Hiring for AI Roles?
columns.description: Confirmed status of whether the company is actively recruiting for AI-related positions (research, engineering, product, etc.). Must be verified through current job postings or careers page.
columns.validation_strategy: Check company careers page, LinkedIn jobs section, and major job boards (Indeed, Glassdoor, AngelList) for active AI job postings. Verify postings are dated within the last 30 days. Look for roles with titles containing: AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Data Science, AI Research, or AI Engineer.

columns.name: Team Size (Approximate)
columns.description: Estimated total number of employees at the company. Provide range if exact number unavailable (e.g., '50-100', '1000+').
columns.validation_strategy: Extract from company website 'About' section, LinkedIn company page employee count, Crunchbase, or recent press releases. If range provided on LinkedIn, use that. For startups, check funding announcements which often mention team size. Validate against multiple sources if possible.

columns.name: Recent Funding (Last Round)
columns.description: Most recent funding round information including round type (Seed, Series A/B/C, etc.), amount raised, and approximate date. Format as 'Round Type - $Amount - Date' (e.g., 'Series B - $50M - Q3 2024'). For bootstrapped companies, note 'Bootstrapped' or 'No external funding'.
columns.validation_strategy: Search Crunchbase, PitchBook, company press releases, and TechCrunch for funding announcements. Verify the most recent round by checking multiple sources. Include date of announcement. For private companies without public funding info, note 'Funding information not publicly available'. For established public companies, note 'Public Company' instead of specific rounds.

columns.name: AI Sector Focus
columns.description: Primary sector or domain where the company applies AI technology. Examples: Research & Development, Healthcare, Enterprise Software, Autonomous Systems, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, etc.
columns.validation_strategy: Review company mission statement, product descriptions, and job postings to identify primary AI application area. Check company website, LinkedIn company description, and recent news articles. Categorize into one primary sector and note secondary sectors if applicable.

search_strategy.description: Find AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established organizations and startups with demonstrated funding and growth

subdomains.name: AI Research & Development Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies focused on fundamental AI research, large language models, foundational AI models, and AI research infrastructure. Includes both independent research labs and research-focused organizations.
search_queries: AI research labs and startups with funding
foundational AI model companies job openings

subdomains.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Organizations applying AI to healthcare, medical imaging, drug discovery, clinical diagnostics, and life sciences. Includes biotech, medtech, and healthcare software companies.
search_queries: drug discovery AI companies job openings
clinical AI and diagnostics companies careers
biotech AI and machine learning positions

subdomains.name: Enterprise & Business AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies providing AI solutions for enterprise customers, business intelligence, automation, analytics, and productivity tools. Includes both SaaS platforms and enterprise software vendors.
search_queries: AI automation and productivity companies jobs
AI analytics and data companies job openings

subdomains.name: Autonomous Systems & Robotics AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Organizations developing AI for autonomous vehicles, robotics, autonomous systems, and physical world AI applications.

Columns needed:

- Website

- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.
search_strategy.table_purpose: Find AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established organizations and startups with demonstrated funding and growth

final_rows.match_rationale: OpenAI is a leading AI research and enterprise company, actively hiring for a wide range of AI roles, with massive recent funding and a clear focus on business and enterprise applications.
PathAI is a leading AI company in digital pathology and diagnostics, actively hiring for AI roles and recognized as a top healthcare AI innovator in 2025[1].
Augmedix develops AI-powered ambient documentation tools for healthcare, is actively hiring, and is recognized as a major player in healthcare AI with rapid adoption in 2025[1][10].
Google DeepMind is a renowned AI research lab focused on developing AI technologies, now integrated with Google Brain for enhanced AI capabilities.
Anthropic is a startup focused on AI research, particularly in large language models, and is actively hiring for AI roles.
Microsoft AI Research is a division of Microsoft focused on AI research and development, actively involved in AI talent acquisition.
Dataiku is a prominent enterprise AI and analytics platform, recognized for hiring in 2025 and serving major business customers with AI-driven data solutions.
